section.title: Technology Requirements
section.p: You need internet access to complete assignments and post your written assignments.
For some homework assignments, you need to access a free internet tool available using a web browser.

You can use a basic calculator at any point in the course, but during exams you may not use a calculator that is capable of doing algebra. For example, if you enter something x+x into your calculator, it must be incapable of responding with 2x. During an exam, you may not use phones, so you should not rely on a phone- or internet-based calculator.
For portions of exams, you will have access to the classroom computers to use a specific tool for studying differential equations.
